CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Data freshness is more than 24 hours old
CRITICAL.message: Data freshness has breached the SLO of 24 hours. Stale data is affecting financial reports.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data pipeline delay immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has breached the SLO of 99.9%. Erroneous financial insights are possible.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data quality issues immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the SLO bounds of 17 to 25 rows
CRITICAL.message: Row count is outside the SLO bounds of 17 to 25 rows. Transaction volume variability might be affecting data integrity.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the row count being outside the SLO bounds.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the SLO limit of 120 minutes
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is approaching the SLO limit of 120 minutes. Dashboard update may be delayed.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary to meet the SLO.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the SLO of 99.9%. Erroneous financial insights are possible.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the slight drop in data quality.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate suddenly spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%. Financial reporting for this merchant may be affected.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the failure rate spike for the affected merchant.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data. This is an informational alert only.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the detection of the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near (but within) the SLO bounds
INFO.message: Daily row count is near (but within) the SLO bounds of 17 to 25 rows. This is an informational alert only.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the row count for monitoring purposes.
